title: Plutarch, Moralia: Advice to Bride and Groom
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Advice to Bride and Groom.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Advice to Bride and Groom.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Advice to Bride and Groom': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
